Table of Contents

Interface IAoInitialize

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that initialize licensing for ArcGIS Desktop, Engine, and Server.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("9AB6A638-ACA8-4820-830C-463EA11C8722")]
public interface IAoInitialize

Methods

CheckInExtension(esriLicenseExtensionCode)

Check in an extension.

esriLicenseStatus CheckInExtension(esriLicenseExtensionCode extensionCode)

Parameters

extensionCode esriLicenseExtensionCode

Returns

esriLicenseStatus

Examples

Sample Snippet

CheckOutExtension(esriLicenseExtensionCode)

Check out an extension.

esriLicenseStatus CheckOutExtension(esriLicenseExtensionCode extensionCode)

Parameters

extensionCode esriLicenseExtensionCode

Returns

esriLicenseStatus

Examples

Sample Snippet

Initialize(esriLicenseProductCode)

This must be called before any other ArcObjects are created to initialize product Code. If called a second time during the life time of an executable with a new product code, it will return esriLicenseAlreadyInitialized.

esriLicenseStatus Initialize(esriLicenseProductCode ProductCode)

Parameters

ProductCode esriLicenseProductCode

Returns

esriLicenseStatus

Examples

Sample Snippet

InitializedProduct()

Retrieve's the product code at which the application has been initialized.

esriLicenseProductCode InitializedProduct()

Returns

esriLicenseProductCode

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsExtensionCheckedOut(esriLicenseExtensionCode)

Is the Extension checked out.

bool IsExtensionCheckedOut(esriLicenseExtensionCode extensionCode)

Parameters

extensionCode esriLicenseExtensionCode

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsExtensionCodeAvailable(esriLicenseProductCode, esriLicenseExtensionCode)

Check if the Product Code is available and then the Extension Code for that product.

esriLicenseStatus IsExtensionCodeAvailable(esriLicenseProductCode ProductCode, esriLicenseExtensionCode extensionCode)

Parameters

ProductCode esriLicenseProductCode
extensionCode esriLicenseExtensionCode

Returns

esriLicenseStatus

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsProductCodeAvailable(esriLicenseProductCode)

Check if the Product Code is available.

esriLicenseStatus IsProductCodeAvailable(esriLicenseProductCode ProductCode)

Parameters

ProductCode esriLicenseProductCode

esriLicenseStatus

Shutdown()

Shutdown method. This should be the last call to ArcObjects in an application.
